description: A paper with known authors and a companion code repository. GitHub discovery (E32-T02) must rank the canonical companion repository ahead of a fork/mirror and an archived, unlicensed copy.
expected_behavior: The canonical, actively maintained, licensed companion repository ranks primary_non_official and outranks both a fork (a possible mirror, demoted to secondary_unknown) and an archived repository with no detected license. Canonical ownership is never asserted from search, so every repository stays recommended_action: review (never auto-fetched).

paper.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks

pending_author_expansion: Author-publication ranking quality is guarded by the dedicated author-publications scenario (E35-T02); this scenario guards companion-repository ranking only.

items.description: Official retrieval augmented generation rag benchmark companion code.
